query:
INSERT INTO items (title, description, price, imageUrl, sellerId, status) VALUES
('Vintage Leather Backpack', 'High-quality vintage leather backpack in excellent condition. Perfect for travel or daily use.', 1200.00, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1553062407-98eeb64c6a62?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', 1, 'available'),
('Apple AirPods Pro', 'Lightly used Apple AirPods Pro with active noise cancellation. Includes original box and charging case.', 3500.00, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1505740420928-5e560c06d30e?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', 1, 'available'),
('Vintage Film Camera', 'Beautiful vintage Pentax film camera from the 1980s. Fully functional with original lens.', 2800.00, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1612198188060-c7c2a3b66eae?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', 2, 'available'),
('Designer Sunglasses', 'Authentic Ray-Ban Wayfarer sunglasses. Slight wear but lenses are perfect. Includes original case.', 1800.00, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1572635196237-14b3f281503f?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', 2, 'available'),
('Mechanical Keyboard', 'Cherry MX mechanical keyboard with RGB lighting. Excellent condition, minimal use.', 2200.00, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1587829191301-4b7b8fb4b237?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', 3, 'available'),
('Vintage Vinyl Records', 'Collection of 10 classic vinyl records from the 1970s. All in great condition with original sleeves.', 1500.00, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1470225620780-dba8ba36b745?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', 3, 'available'),
('Leather Watch', 'Premium leather watch with Japanese movement. Barely worn, perfect condition.', 2500.00, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523170335258-f5ed11844a49?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', 1, 'available'),
('Portable Bluetooth Speaker', 'Waterproof Bluetooth speaker with excellent sound quality. Perfect for outdoor activities.', 1100.00, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1589003077984-894e133da26d?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', 2, 'available');
